description: Code-agent dialogue and async code graph tool entry. code_gen_orchestrate validates full_requirement, runner_id, and context.session_id, then schedules dependency-check in the background.

publicContracts.name: code_gen_orchestrate
publicContracts.description: Async code graph entry tool. It requires full_requirement and runner_id, carries context.session_id, and returns a runner-assignment instruction when runner_id is missing.
publicContracts.payloadShape: { full_requirement: string; runner_id?: string; context?: { session_id?: string; chooseSolution?: string; chooseAction?: 'app'|'unit'|'data-point' }; requirement?: string; runnerId?: string; targetKind?: 'app'|'unit'|'data-point'; appName?: string; unitName?: string; logicModelId?: string; frontendModelId?: string; logicModelIndex?: number; frontendModelIndex?: number }
publicContracts.resultShape: String. Missing runner_id returns a runner assignment instruction; present runner_id returns scheduled/resume_scheduled while the graph continues in the background.
publicContracts.subject: code-agent

publicContracts.name: CodeAgentTargetKind
publicContracts.description: Coarse target kind retained for the next workflow implementation.

publicContracts.name: CodeAgentTargetSelection
publicContracts.description: Runner-backed Solution/App target metadata retained for the next workflow implementation.
publicContracts.payloadShape: { targetKind: CodeAgentTargetKind; runnerId: string; solutionId: string; solutionName: string; solutionVersion: string; solutionInitialized: boolean; appId?: string; appName?: string; appVersion?: string; appInitialized?: boolean }
